name: Potato Varenikes
recipeIngredient: 4 large potatoes, cooked in their skins
1/2 cup green onions, white and green parts thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Place flour in a bowl. Add the rest of the ingredients. Mix until smooth, adding more flour if needed.
2. Turn dough onto a floured board and knead until smooth, adding more flour if needed.
3. Roll out dough to make it thin. Cut into 3-inch circles.
4. Place filling on one-third of each circle. Brush edges with egg white.
5. Fold the circles over the filling, pressing edges together to seal.
6. Cook in salted boiling water until they rise to the surface.
Potato Filling:
1. Cook onions in fat until crisp and almost brown.
2. Peel potatoes when cool enough to handle.
3. Mash potatoes, adding cooked onions and remaining fat.
4. Season with salt and pepper. Add nutmeg.
Savory Cheese Filling:
1. Stir together all ingredients.
